title.en: This is the power of the Invincible Ancestor!

content.en:
The Supreme Ancestor and the Invincible Ancestor seem to be only one realm apart, but the difference in strength is incomparably huge, like a world apart.

Take the One Tribulation Beast as an example, the One Tribulation Beast is a relatively weak invincible ancestor, but even so, it takes so many supreme beings to join forces, and it costs a lot of supreme lives to kill it.

If it were a normal invincible ancestor, so many supreme beings would also be defeated if they joined forces.

This is the power of the Invincible Ancestor!

And the difficulty of attacking the invincible ancestor from the strongest ancestor is more than a hundred times more difficult than the top ancestor impacting the strongest ancestor.

Among the many exotic worlds, there are quite a few supreme ones, and every exotic world has more or less the strongest ones, except for the new exotic worlds.

But there are too few exotic worlds with invincible people, and invincible people at the level of invincible ancestors can be regarded as truly free from the shackles of an exotic world, with an infinite future, and no longer a frog at the bottom of the well.

According to the information provided by the Wuhai Sword Ancestor, if the Supreme Ancestor wants to become an invincible ancestor, he must meet three conditions.

One is one hundred Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, if there are no 100 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, even if other conditions are met, it is very likely to break through, and the deeper the accumulation, the more Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals need to be prepared.

It is often difficult to collect one Origin Rule Heist Crystal, and it is simply too difficult to collect a hundred Origin Rule Heist Crystals.

But in fact, this is the easiest condition to achieve, after all, if the strength is strong, even if one Great Tribulation accumulates one Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, a hundred Great Tribulations are enough to collect them all.

The second condition is more difficult, absorb the power of the catastrophe, and use the power of a foreign world to overcome the catastrophe itself.

At this time, the strongest person is faced with two choices, one is to take the path of the physical body, that is, to absorb the power of the tribulation with the physical body, temper the body with the power of the calamity, and condense the invincible body;

The calamity is terrifying, where does the average supreme person dare to absorb refining, and if he wants to absorb enough calamity, he has to go through many tribulations.

Basically, if the body or soul is tribulated more than five times, there is a high probability of impacting the invincible realm.

However, it is too difficult to survive more than five times.

"Could it be that the blood robbery has something to do with the tribulation?"

Ye Tian guessed.

If the Blood Tribulation can help a Supreme Mighty person quickly complete more than five Tribulations, and it is relatively safe, it is truly priceless, enough to make any Supreme Strongman desperate.

The third condition is the most difficult, but it is also the easiest for some of the strongest.

During the non-tribulation period, enter the foreign world, resist the foreign rules with your body or soul, and through the stimulation of the foreign rules, let yourself complete the qualitative change, so as to be promoted to the invincible realm.

However, this is extremely risky, and if you are not careful, you will die.

The strongest can hardly resist the rules of the foreign world, even if they only step into the foreign world for a second, they are likely to be unable to bear it and die directly.

But if there are enough life-saving things, entering and exiting the rules of the exotic world again and again, and slowly adapting to it, there is a certain hope of being promoted to the invincible realm.

That's all three conditions.

"It's difficult! It's so difficult! No wonder so many supreme people can't be promoted to invincible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At present, he has a lot of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals in his hands.

Although that robber beast was only a tribulation beast, it had more than 10,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals on his body, and his strength was strong, so he snatched more than 5,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals.

However, his foundation is too deep, so the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals he needs are definitely far superior to those of other supreme powers, and a hundred Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals is definitely not enough, at least 2,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals need to be prepared.

If it hadn't been for the killing of the Tribulation Tribulation Beast this time, he was afraid that it would have taken a long time to accumulate so many Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals.

The Origin Rule Robbery Crystal seems to be very precious, but in fact it is only useful for the strongest, and for those who are invincible, it is estimated that it is not very useful, at most it can only be used as currency.

Ye Tian now met the first condition, leaving only the second and third conditions.

"Absorb the power of robbery!"

Ye Tian sensed the power of the Great Tribulation that permeated the Heaven and Earth of the Dark Forbidden Domain, this power was extremely chaotic and terrifying, and it was difficult to absorb and refine it at all.

Abrupt.

He thought that he had copied the talent of the Tribulation Beast, and one of the talents was the Eternal Talent Tribulation, perhaps this talent had something to do with the Tribulation Power.

And so.

Ye Tian began to fuse the Eternal Talent Tribulation to see what this talent could be used for.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai completely fused the eternal talent: Tribulation.

That's when he realized the usefulness of this talent.

"It turned out to be absorbing the power of the calamity and refining the flesh!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He finally knew why the robber beasts were so powerful, the robber beasts could absorb the power of the robber again and again to refine the body, even if they were sleeping, they were also invisibly absorbing the power of the robber to improve their strength.

If the robber beast is allowed to survive many catastrophes, how terrifying will that strength be!

"The Eternal Talent Tribulation is a talent specifically for the physical body, and it seems that I can only go through the physical body tribulation. Ye Tian thought to himself.

In fact, the Path of the Ancestors was originally biased towards the physical body, so the Eternal Talent Tribulation was indeed very suitable for him.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian urged the Eternal Talent Tribulation and absorbed the Tribulation Power between Heaven and Earth at an incredible speed.

This kind of calamity entered Ye Tian's physical body and quickly refined his physical body.

Time passed slowly, and before long had passed, Ye Tian's physical body was much stronger, and he felt the suppression of him by the rules of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

At this moment, Ye Tian had some enlightenment.

His flesh is doomed!

He was an invincible existence among the Supreme Ancestors, and the Endless Ancestor Body was also extremely powerful, so the power of his physical body was naturally far superior to that of other Supreme Beings.

Rumble!!!!

The rules of the Dark Forbidden Realm have become regular flames, regular wind knives, and regular thunder...... kept trying to annihilate Ye Tian's physical body, but such a catastrophe did not make Ye Tian's physical body annihilated, but became stronger and stronger.

Not long after, Ye Tian's physical body was considered to have survived the first physical tribulation.

Then, he continued to cultivate, striving to complete the two physical tribulations when the Dark Forbidden Domain Tribulation passed.

In that case, there will be a huge increase in his strength.

In the end, when the Dark Forbidden Tribulation was about to pass, Ye Tian finally ushered in the second physical tribulation, and successfully passed it, and the strength of the physical body skyrocketed.
